violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. The floor under/in-between the flat top and frier in need of cleaning.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. Hoods above the flat top/fryer are showing obvious signs of grease.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
